evals.prompt: Use $orchestrated-delivery to execute the existing package at docs/implementation/epics/E7/execution. It is marked ready_for_implementation. Stop after local commits unless I explicitly ask for PR publication.
evals.expected_output: The agent validates the package, binds runtime/provider facts, presents or follows an approved execution plan, dispatches packaged implementer and reviewer prompts in dependency waves, commits approved pathsets, creates tracker evidence commits, and stops before PR publication.
assertions: OD-1: The run starts only after finding an existing package marked ready_for_implementation.
OD-2: The agent records runtime/provider facts without editing package-owned scope, prompts, ACs, dependency order, model class, or effort.
OD-3: Dependency waves launch only when prerequisite story and tracker evidence commits exist.
OD-4: Each story reuses one implementer and one reviewer context, and workers do not stage, commit, push, PR, merge, or close contexts.
OD-5: Coordinator treats reviewer approval as advisory and commits only the approved pathset after its own scope/gate inspection.
OD-6: Each completed story has a story commit followed by a tracker-only evidence commit.
OD-7: The agent stops at the requested local-commit boundary.
OD-8: Updates are sparse and evidence-based.

evals.prompt: Use $orchestrated-delivery on this execution folder. It has plan.md and tracker.md, but no package-contained deep readiness verdict and one implementer prompt says to infer missing ACs from the code.
evals.expected_output: The agent refuses execution and routes the package back to plan-delivery or plan-epic as appropriate. It does not repair prompts, invent ACs, reorder stories, change model class or effort, or dispatch workers.
assertions: OD-1: Missing deep readiness evidence or incomplete prompts cause refusal.
OD-1: Structural file presence alone is not treated as readiness.
OD-2: The agent does not author or repair package-owned decisions.
OD-8: The refusal is concise and names the owning planning repair path.

evals.prompt: Use $orchestrated-delivery on the ready package and open a PR when all stories land. Do not wait for review, merge, or clean up.
evals.expected_output: The agent completes local story and tracker commits, opens or updates the PR only after authorization, reports the PR URL, and stops without review waiting, merge, cleanup, or worker-context overreach.
assertions: OD-6: Story commits and tracker evidence commits exist before publication.
OD-7: PR publication respects the requested boundary and stops after reporting the URL.
OD-7: Review waiting is not started without explicit request.
OD-8: The closeout reports evidence rather than dumping transcripts or diffs.
